programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: E9 - Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: E103 - Flamenco
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are flamenco dancing! Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po are surprisingly good.

programme.title: E17 - The Chickening
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E2 - Andy And The Meerkats
programme.desc: Andy heads to Africa to meet some meerkats and record their alarm call on his gizmo.

programme.title: E35 - The Brave Banana Badge
programme.desc: When thunder and lightning scares the squirrels, Duggee teaches them about bravery.

programme.title: E34 - The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: E7 - Nia And The Unfriendly Elephant
programme.desc: Nia is excited about being asked to transport a new elephant to the animal park, but the animal is scared of steam trains.

programme.title: E33 - Bubble Bumbling
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: E34 - Toggle Tangle
programme.desc: After Sarah helps Scarf Lady prepare the wool for her new roof, she settles down for a dreamy sleep.

programme.title: E15 - It's Time For A Race
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran have their own sports day with Jared and Cynthia, but when JoJo isn't fast enough to win the races, Gran Gran suggests JoJo try the egg and spoon race instead!

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E103
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E5 - How To Improve Meals In Long Term Care And Accommodation Centers
programme.desc: Initiatives to enhance the nutrition of people living in long term care facilities are being implemented by those who've made it their mission. Also covered: juice pears; the best margarine; the Day of the Dead and pan de muerto in Mexico.

programme.title: E7 - Iceland's Highland Lights
programme.desc: In Iceland, the Highlands lie 400 metres above sea level. Covering the same surface area as Switzerland and virtually uninhabited, they are one of Europe's last remaining wildernesses. Olivier Joly, journalist and photographer, invites us to discover his favourite spots, his friends and an age-old tradition: the Rettir.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E3 - 拆解職場核心競爭力
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E37 - 高顏值陳列師帥氣登場
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E3 - 拆解職場核心競爭力

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: L'édition nuit : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'actualité ne s'arrête jamais. Un journal complet consacré à l'information française et internationale, pour rester informé à tout moment, où que l'on soit dans le monde.

programme.title: Le journal de l'Afrique
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique pour un rendez-vous quotidien afin de suivre l'actualité du continent africain, avec des correspondants et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: E13 - Killed My Mother Or Innocent Driver?
programme.desc: A tragic car crash leads to the death of an 89-year-old woman. Her daughter, who was behind the wheel, is blamed for her death and faces a life behind bars. Carless driver or devastated crash survivor?

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: E5 - Kerry Lynn Dalton
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene 'Melanie' May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Spontaneous Generation
programme.desc: The kids discover a trap door, but there isn't enough time to explore the mystery beyond as detention ends and Principal Lounsberry returns. Brett keeps them at bay with his quick wit and the group's adventure remains a secret. A search for clues reveals new hope.

programme.title: Quebec
programme.desc: Quebec winter thrill: Dogsledding, ice sculpting, hockey lesson with local teens, and extreme sledding at Village Vacances Valcartier. A week of icy adventures with Nicole in Canada!

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: Ask us Anything!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand turns fire juggler to reveal the body's secret sense – proprioception, but will Dr. Chris notice something is up? And Dr. Dan investigates organs on chips, with no salt and vinegar!

programme.title: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Doki can't stand when he doesn't know something. So when Gabi becomes extra secretive about her diary, he's determined to find out why. The Team learns about spy techniques and ways to uncover secrets that others don't want you to know!

programme.title: Ask us Anything!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand turns fire juggler to reveal the body's secret sense – proprioception, but will Dr. Chris notice something is up? And Dr. Dan investigates organs on chips, with no salt and vinegar!

programme.title: The Need for Speed
programme.desc: All eyes are on speed skater Izzy who has one last chance to prove she has got what it takes to represent Team Great Britain at the Olympics. And ice dancer Ella swaps her ice skates for pedals at the velodrome.

programme.title: Math is Everywhere
programme.desc: This episode explores mathematical patterns in nature, such as the tessellating hexagonal units of a honeycomb, the bilateral symmetry of a leaf, and the radial symmetry of a snowflake and spider web. Math really is everywhere!

programme.title: The Incredible Heart Pump
programme.desc: The doctors show how far your heart can pump blood. Dr. Xand meets a lifesaving dog and Dr. Chris is in the Ouch-Mobile. In the emergency room, one patient's face is swollen with a dental abscess and another has sliced her finger on an electric fire.

programme.title: Things Don't Always Go To Plan
programme.desc: Acrobatic pair Finn and Kirsten are used to winning medals - they even took home the bronze for Great Britain at the World Acrobatic Championships. But now they will compete as seniors for the first time at the British Championships in Liverpool.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: Green Science and Recycling
programme.desc: What's the difference between science and green science? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of renewable energy. Have hands-on fun by making your lettuce sustainable, and get to know Ryoji Noyori, a chemist and great advocate of green chemistry.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: The Double Mystery
programme.desc: Addison is faced with a double challenge: figuring out who is behind a series of very strange thefts in Ayrton Park, and then when she does discover that the perpetrator is her own mother, getting to the bottom of why her mom seems to have gone over to the “dark side”.

programme.title: The Pet
programme.desc: Leo wants a pet. Sprinter gives her Pesto - a small ball of his fur. Unfortunately, DiktaThor shows up and wants Pesto too.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: What a Pong!
programme.desc: There is a pong or two in the lab as the doctors discover how your sense of smell can bring back memories. And Dr. Xand is flung back 246 years by the time machine to search for Mr. Grumbles' missing inhaler.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Microscope
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Microscope. He has just discovered the cure for smelly burps.

programme.title: My Mini Bakes: Mini Baking Sensation
programme.desc: Emma Salt meets My Mini Bakes - a viral sensation on the social media platform TikTok and holder of the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to assemble twenty mini hamburgers! What will be the one thing Emma learns from this encounter with My Mini Bakes?

programme.title: Men on The Moon
programme.desc: We take viewers back in time to the moment the historic Apollo program changed our world forever by landing a man on the moon. Astronauts, explorers, and engineers weigh in on the successes and failures of the missions and what we learned about ourselves in the process.

programme.title: What a Pong!
programme.desc: There is a pong or two in the lab as the doctors discover how your sense of smell can bring back memories. And Dr. Xand is flung back 246 years by the time machine to search for Mr. Grumbles' missing inhaler.

programme.title: Life Changes
programme.desc: Welsh National Men's champion gymnast Cameron has a lot on his plate. Coach Karen is concerned when Cameron is late for yet another training session. Meanwhile, young artistic gymnast Madi is putting her heart and soul into realizing her gymnastic future.

programme.title: Cough it up!
programme.desc: The Doctors reveal what comes out of your mouth when you cough and Dr Xand watches an operation. In the emergency room, one patient has banged their head, and another has a toy coin stuck up his nose.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: Why Are Plants So Green?
programme.desc: The chlorophyll in plants takes in energy from sunlight. It absorbs colours like red and blue, but reflects the green wavelengths back to us. This process makes plants look green to our eyes.

E2 - Yukon Wild
programme.desc: The Yukon is a true wilderness, one of the last on Earth. The vast land got its name from its longest river, which the Gwich’in, one of the indigenous people of the region, call 'Yu-kun- ah', or, the 'great river'. The third longest waterway in North America, the Yukon River flows through wide open valleys and narrow channels over 3,000 km Northwest towards the storm tossed Bering Sea.

programme.title: E4 - Platypus Predicament
programme.desc: Stand by as rescue officers use a technique called flagging to nab a koala with dangerously inflamed eyes. Soothe burned possum feet with vet Tim, then shadow vet Karina as she examines a half-drowned platypus before referring him to a specialist.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E7 - The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Beni and Lala get an unexpected visit from Vet Arga, Kesi makes a new friend on Bangamat Island, and Alejandra deals with a new view of the world after the accident at forest school leaves her blind in one eye.

programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. programme.title: E5 - Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: Juggle the demands of caring for sick koala joeys with vet Claire, then see what it takes to save a squirrel glider caught in barbed wire. Take care of an exhausted owl and get a big surprise when vet Tim X-rays a turtle that was struck by a car.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family

programme.title: E7 - The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Beni and Lala get an unexpected visit from Vet Arga, Kesi makes a new friend on Bangamat Island, and Alejandra deals with a new view of the world after the accident at forest school leaves her blind in one eye.

programme.title: E2 - Yukon Wild
programme.desc: The Yukon is a true wilderness, one of the last on Earth. The vast land got its name from its longest river, which the Gwich’in, one of the indigenous people of the region, call 'Yu-kun- ah', or, the 'great river'. The third longest waterway in North America, the Yukon River flows through wide open valleys and narrow channels over 3,000 km Northwest towards the storm tossed Bering Sea.

programme.title: Electric Fruit: The Nigerian Market Running On Rotten Food
programme.desc: In a Lagos market, spoiled pineapples and watermelons are turned into biogas. Plus: E-cargo bikes drive health and sustainability in Uganda.

programme.title: Secret Agreements And Nazi Art
programme.desc: A look back at the secret Sykes-Picot Agreement. In 1916, France and Britain divided the Middle East between themselves, with repercussions that are still felt today. And, Nazi art: the trade with taboos.

programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E112 - Follow the Sprinkles
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy.

programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: E110 - The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers

programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E1 - Theresa's Back
programme.desc: Theresa Caputo is back and goes global with her gift of communicating with the dead. With a tour coming up, she decides to do a reading in town before heading off, ends up getting a surprise from clients.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.desc: Difficult to understand medical care is easily explained in this program as well as tips on healthcare.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

programme.desc: Today's latest metropolitan area news and weather information program.

programme.desc: The artist AI listens to your problems about parenting, work, and relationships. If you've had a tough day, join us for 30 minutes-this program may help you find a brighter tomorrow.

programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.desc: Cooking instructors will show all there is to know for a good hearty cooking.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin
programme.desc: The story takes place in winter, 1950. In the freezing cold Changjin Lake region, a bloody battle between the United States and China begins. Faced with the harshest conditions of extreme cold, lack of rations and vast difference in weaponry, the Chinese troops forge ahead, fearless and determined. They successfully blow up the Shuimen Bridge, making the most critical victory in the War to Resist U.S. Aggression and Aid Korea.

programme.title: 77 Heartbreaks
programme.desc: When Adam and Eva break up after ten years, Adam thinks the breach was caused by one trivial incident, but Eva knows she's already forgiven Adam 77 times! Sweethearts since law school, Adam changed professions to start a Thai boxing studio and gradually became indifferent to Eva. Seemingly petty matters, like forgetting she hates raisin cookies, become the catalyst for her moving out and changing her Facebook status to 'single'. Despondent, Adam has a drunken tryst with his student, Mandy. Adam gains new insight after accidentally discovering Eva's private journal. Entitled '77 Heartbreaks', the title refers to the philosophy that 'forgiving someone 7 times isn't enough; 70 x 7 times is too much; so go ahead and forgive 77 times!' Reading it makes Adam realize his love. But what can he do to win her back? And what secret is contained in the journal's torn-out last page? He rushes to Eva and melts her heart by recounting their happy memories. When Eva tells him Heartbreak #77

programme.title: Be With You: An Abandoned Team
programme.desc: Yam Chun Kai, is a 60-year-old curmudgeon living alone. Forced into retirement, Uncle Kai reflects on his failed marriage and strained relationship with his daughter. As the hopelessness prompts him to end his life, a stray dog named Roast Piggy finds Uncle Kai and leads an animal welfare volunteer, Una Tang, to rescue him-the intelligence and humanity of Roast Piggy change Uncle Kai's attitude towards stray animals. Uncle Kai becomes friends with Una and joins her animal shelter 'Warm Home' as a volunteer, helping the abandoned animals. Una hopes Uncle Kai can take this opportunity to clear the air between him and his daughter Zoie. Just as Uncle Kai's life seems to be getting back on track, several dog poisoning incidents occur in the village he lives in...

programme.title: Bad Newz
programme.desc: Saloni's life turns chaotic when two men, Akhil and Gurbir, believe they each have a future with her. As tensions rise, Saloni must navigate their rivalry and choose her own path forward. Release Year: 2024 Director: Anand Tiwari

programme.title: Darr
programme.desc: Rahul is obsessed with Kiran and stalks her constantly. However, Rahul goes berserk when she gets engaged to Sunil, a navy officer, and he decides to forcefully claim Kiran for himself. Release Year: 1993 Director: Yash Chopra Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Comedian/Comedienne Anupam Kher, Silver Lotus Award- Best Popular Film Providing Wholesome Entertainment Yash Chopra

programme.title: Sangdil Sanam
programme.desc: Two children are betrothed but the girl's father robs a bank and frames the boy's father for it. Years later, the grown-up boy returns to take his bride back home. Release Year: 1994 Director: Shomu Mukherjee

programme.title: Haathi Mere Saathi
programme.desc: Raju performs at the streets in the company of four elephants. He gets married and is told to make a choice between his animal friends or his family. Release Year: 2021 Director: Prabhu Solomon

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. programme.title: E5 - Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra crew tests out the plane that crash landed last year by landing on an ice strip while a hotshot Australian pilot tries for a job at Buffalo.

programme.title: E6 - Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Devan threatens to punch David in mid-air, Joe blows up at his crew, the water-bombers arrive at “Iron Maiden” singer Bruce Dickinson’s hangar in Wales, and Will threatens to quit.

programme.title: E3 - Roots Run Deep
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: E7 - Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.title: E6 - A Pirate Ship´s Last Jaunt
programme.desc: A pirate ship on a voyage. The Kogas - a retired pirate ship, is to start a new life as a noble restaurant in Berlin. But the journey to get there will be difficult, for the Kogas is docked in Lithuania. A risky and extremely difficult heavy transport over a distance of one thousand kilometres lies ahead. Because the Kogas weighs almost fifty tonnes, a special ship will take it across the Baltic Sea to Poland, and from there across the Oder and the Havel Canal to Berlin. The last journey of the Kogas - a huge logistical task where not everything will always go according to plan.

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: E4 - Thailand
programme.desc: In the most action packed trip yet, Rooftop and Catfish’s trip to Thailand has them face to face with the country’s nature. They wrestle a crocodile, charm a cobra, and get a massage from an elephant that’s somehow more relaxing than the traditional Thai massages they tried out. The two even attempt to catch (cooked) flying chickens on their heads. Things relaxed in Thailand for a moment when the BMX bikers got to balance out this animal packed experience with the spiritual side of the country, each getting Sak Yant, a traditional Thai tattoo. However, the relaxation was short-lived as Catfish and Rooftops’s final battle in Thailand requires them to make it out of a May Thai boxing match alive.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: September 1994. French President Francois Mitterrand had to manage a complicated cohabitation with Prime Minister Edouard Balladur. programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E2 - Can I Keep It?
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or 'Cadobbit', Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is soon in over his head as it turns on him.

programme.title: E3 - The Fire Breather
programme.desc: After eating a bunch of fiery-hot peppers Chowder starts to breathe fire whenever he opens his mouth.

programme.title: E5 - Panini For President
programme.desc: Panini runs in an election in Marzipan City.

programme.title: E10 - Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.desc: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

programme.desc: Phil's efforts to prove aliens exist land him in trouble.

programme.title: E10 - Rocky Mountain High
programme.desc: Stranded 9000 feet above sea level in the snow covered Rocky Mountains, Cody and Joe battle hypothermia and stay alive long enough.

programme.title: E9 - Malta Ford Cortina
programme.desc: Having wanted to buy a Ford Cortina for 20 years, Mike finally finds a rust-free Mk2 in Malta. Unfortunately, the rest of the car is a complete mess.

programme.title: E11 - Shipbreakers
programme.desc: Facing a global pandemic, half the fleet is tied up leaving a handful of boats to catch the fleet-wide quota or face closure of the fishery.

programme.title: Sharktopia
programme.desc: In this special, Mark teams up with cinematographer and shark expert Kina Scollay to hunt for a brand new walking shark species and hunt for schooling hammerheads.

programme.title: E5 - Worst Expedition Ever
programme.desc: A near-deadly case of dengue fever almost stops Mickey before he's arrested at gunpoint and imprisoned in Brazil. Missing footage leads to questions.

programme.title: E12 - Lost And Found
programme.desc: The true identity of infamous plane hijacker D.B. Cooper may finally be revealed. The fate of Michael Rockefeller, lost heir to the Rockefeller fortune, is exposed.

programme.title: E9 - Malta Ford Cortina
programme.desc: Having wanted to buy a Ford Cortina for 20 years, Mike finally finds a rust-free Mk2 in Malta. Unfortunately, the rest of the car is a complete mess.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes

Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Gising Pilipinas[Live]
programme.desc: Morning Newscast

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Tricky Business
programme.desc: Happy specializes in playing tricks, but he refuses to work for rich man Shi. By coincidence, Happy meets Moon and falls for her. However, he is not aware it is just a trick...

programme.title: Lucky Diamond
programme.desc: Mr. and Mrs. Cao had an heirloom, a valuable diamond named “LUCKY STAR”. They insured the diamond for a large sum of money then hired four gangsters to rob it in order to cheat the insurance company for the compensation. However, when the gangsters got the diamond, one of them intended to possess the diamond alone but was discovered by the others. They were very angry and wanted to kill him. He escaped into Zhi's house and put the diamond into the facial cream of Zhi and then quitted. Unluckily, Zhi was mistaken by the other three that she was his member and helped to receive the loot. So Zhi was involved in the case and was attacked by the three gangsters but fortunately she could escape with her tricks...

programme.title: A Chinese Odyssey (Part II - Cinderella)
programme.desc: The Joker travels back in time to save his beloved, the reformed devil Boney M. But instead of the right place and right time, he finds himself stranded in five hundred years back...

programme.title: Lucky Diamond

programme.title: Beyond's Diary
programme.desc: This is the story of four aspiring young men striving to fight for their own goals. Kui and his family are intent upon emigrating to another country and they put all their energy in making as much money as possible in order to leave Hong Kong sooner. However just as their goal is about in sight, over-exertion causes Kui to fall ill...Keung is a smart and aggressive young man whose ambition is to make it in the world. But misfortune descends upon him when discovering that he and his family are duped by his boss...It has been a childhood dream of Chung to join the police force but his fragile frame of a body is far from satisfactory, so he turns to conducting traffic and handing out tickets to unfortunate drivers amid the bustles of the streets. However, his virtue is not appreciated...Wing is a diligent and self-absorbed student. His goal is to be one of the chosen few at his college's Music Department but he is dissuaded by his girlfriend's father. In the end he gives in and

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.
